meaning: n.象征,徽章,符号,<古>寓意画vt.用象征表示
examples: The dove is an emblem of peace.
The eagle was an emblem of strength and courage.
It seems to me that Pygmalion's frenzy is a good emblem.
The pen is made with knurled bands and is stamped with the Bentley starter emblem.
His past winners include Silver Charm (1997), Real Quiet (1998) and War Emblem (2002).
